description_long: A rectangular black ceramic plate holds four pieces of salmon nigiri sushi, each consisting of a mound of white rice topped with a slice of orange-pink salmon featuring delicate white striations. The sushi pieces are neatly aligned in a row, showcasing the glossy, slightly translucent texture of the salmon. Two dark brown wooden chopsticks are placed diagonally across the plate, adding an element of traditional Japanese dining. The rice appears compact and slightly textured, with individual grains visible beneath the salmon. The plate itself has a subtle marbled pattern and a smooth, slightly reflective finish. No visible garnishes or sauces accompany the sushi, emphasizing a minimalist and elegant presentation.
description: Four pieces of salmon nigiri sushi are arranged on a black ceramic plate with a pair of wooden chopsticks. The presentation is clean and minimalist, highlighting the fresh salmon and compact rice.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four pieces of salmon nigiri sushi lined up on a black plate with chopsticks resting horizontally behind them.
description_view_1: Angled side view emphasizing the thickness of the salmon slices and the layered arrangement of the sushi, with chopsticks extending off the plate.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sushi pieces and the full length of the crossed chopsticks on the plate.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, highlighting the compactness of the rice and the salmon's smooth surface, with chopsticks visible to the left.
